_comment: All six upstream repositories are vendored as GIT SUBMODULES (the parent repo was already under Git and the tree was clean, so submodules were preferred over ignored vendor clones). Only the commit pointer is tracked here -- no upstream source is copied into this repo, and no upstream file has been modified. Re-hydrate with: git submodule update --init --recursive

repositories.name: grounding_dino
repositories.notes: Original Grounding DINO. Detector core for the whole project. Custom CUDA op (MultiScaleDeformableAttention) must be compiled. ONNX export is community-only, not officially supported.

repositories.name: mm_grounding_dino
repositories.notes: MM-Grounding-DINO lives INSIDE mmdetection. Code: mmdet/models/detectors/grounding_dino.py. Configs: configs/mm_grounding_dino/. Docs: configs/mm_grounding_dino/{usage,dataset_prepare}.md. Model index: configs/mm_grounding_dino/metafile.yml. Full mmdet repo vendored so those paths resolve.

repositories.name: grounded_sam
repositories.notes: Grounding DINO + SAM v1. Bundles its own GroundingDINO/ and segment_anything/ copies -- do NOT re-download those weights; share checkpoints/grounding_dino/ and checkpoints/sam/.

repositories.name: grounded_sam_2
repositories.notes: Grounding DINO 1.0 (local) + SAM 2 video tracking. THE key repo for this project: local text-prompted detection plus a 10+ Hz-capable tracker. Also ships GD-1.5/1.6 and DINO-X demos that are CLOUD-API-BACKED (DDS) with no local weights -- see docs/MODEL_INVENTORY.md.

repositories.name: pet_dino
repositories.notes: CVPR 2026 Highlight. mmdet fork. Text AND visual prompts (AFVPG). Authorship verified: project page fuweifuvtoo.github.io/pet-dino -> this repo -> HF org 'fuweifu'. Only a Swin-T weight is published; the Swin-L config has no released weight.

repositories.name: refdrone
repositories.notes: RefDrone benchmark + NGDINO. mmdet fork. Dataset-associated reference model, NOT one of the five primary systems. NGDINO configs: configs/NGDINO/.
